reference: I went to the dentist yesterday to replace a filling. He gave me a few novocaine shots and noticed that my cheek swelled up significantly, which never happened before. I am home now, almost twenty-four hours later, and while it has reduced, it still looks like I have a chipmunk cheek on one side. What can I do? It doesn't hurt except if I smile. It is not black and blue, just puffy.
text: I went to the dentist yesterday to replace a filling. He gave me a few Novocaine shots and noticed that my cheek swelled up significantly, which never happened, but... I am home now, almost 24 hours later. And while it has reduced, it still looks like I have a chipmunk cheek on one side. What can I do? It doesn't hurt except if I smile. It is not black and blue, just puffy.
